about.label: About Us
about.title: Connecting Global Talent with Local Opportunities
about.subtitle: Global solutions for workforce shortage
about.text1: Global Jobs Consulting is a full-service recruitment agency specializing in placing workforce from Asia and Africa in European markets. With a network of 11 partner agencies, we offer complete staffing solutions for employers in Romania, Austria, and Serbia.
about.text2: We handle the entire process: from rigorous candidate selection, immigration documentation (visas and work permits), community integration, and long-term monitoring.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.description: Whether you're an employer looking for staff or a candidate seeking opportunities, we're here to help.

footer.description: International recruitment agency in Romania, Austria and Serbia. 11 partners in Asia and Africa.
